title: phlox kelseyi var. minor
intro: Phlox kelseyi var. minor, also known as Kelsey's phlox or dwarf Kelsey's phlox, is a rare and compact variant of the Kelsey's phlox plant (Phlox kelseyi), a perennial flowering plant native to the southwestern United States. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phlox kelseyi var. minor include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate respiratory issues, and exhibit antioxidant effects. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
